narrative:
Precinct Blue Rock (precinct in Muskingum County) has 436 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 23.6 percentage points.
